channel.title: Cyber Digest
channel.description: Independent threat intelligence and cybersecurity news, written for practitioners.

item.title: Inside the Volt Typhoon resurgence: 90 days of dwell, pivot and living off the land
item.description: The operators returned to OT-adjacent telco infrastructure. We reconstruct the access chain and map it against MITRE ATT&CK v16.

item.title: CVE-2024-47575 — FortiManager FortiJump
item.description: Missing authentication in FortiManager fgfm protocol handler allows unauthenticated command execution as root.
